para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 单个工具更换过程涉及多个机构的同步操作。ATC 操作的基本概述如下：

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ; font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;
li.text: Z 轴移动到第二个参照位置

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:7px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;

text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;

text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;

text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;

text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;

text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;

text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;

text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;

text-align:justify; text-indent:-23px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:23px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;

text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;
li.text: ATC 机械臂停在待机位置

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;

text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:5px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 这是 ATC 操作的基本概述。机床上的实际换刀顺序可能会因选配不同而有所差异。
